item.title: AI has officially turned midnight meowing into a full-blown concert. Thanks to OpenAI‚Äôs Sora 2, the internet is going crazy over hyper-realistic clips of a cat performing outside its owner‚Äôs door ‚ÄĒ switching from drums to guitar to piano like a furry one-
